01.

about.md

I'm a SDET & QA Engineer based in Ankara, Turkey — with a background in frontend development that gives me a unique edge in understanding both sides of the software delivery pipeline.

My work centers on AI-driven automation, architecting test frameworks with Playwright + TypeScript, and pushing quality gates into CI/CD pipelines via ArgoCD and Bitbucket Pipelines.

I've reduced debugging time by 40% through intelligent automation at Cimri.com — eliminating manual testing bottlenecks and creating reliable end-to-end test suites that scale with the product.
